description: Comprehensive reference of Nepali abbreviations and acronyms for TTS text normalization. A text normalizer must expand these abbreviated forms into full spoken Nepali before synthesis. Critical for the NepTTS-Bench challenging real-world cases section.

notes.usage: Used by the text normalization stage of the TTS pipeline to detect and expand Nepali abbreviations into their full spoken forms
notes.dot_convention: Nepali abbreviations typically use a Devanagari period (purna-biram ।) or a Latin full stop (.) between abbreviated syllables, e.g., ने.क.पा.
notes.ambiguity: Some abbreviations are context-dependent (e.g., मि. could be मिटर or मिनेट); the normalizer should use surrounding context to disambiguate
notes.source_domains: Abbreviations are drawn from politics, government, measurement, titles, media, and administrative contexts commonly found in Nepali news, official documents, and daily speech

political_organizational.context: Political party references in news and government
political_organizational.description: One of Nepal's major political parties; frequently abbreviated in headlines and party communications

political_organizational.context: Political party references in news and government
political_organizational.description: Nepal's oldest democratic party; very common abbreviation in political coverage

political_organizational.context: Political ideology and party faction labels
political_organizational.description: Used as suffix to party name, e.g., ने.क.पा. (मा.ले.); common in political reporting

political_organizational.context: Full political party name with faction
political_organizational.description: Combined abbreviation commonly seen in formal political contexts
Maoist faction of the Communist Party; frequently seen in post-2006 political coverage
Nepali abbreviation for the United Nations; very common in international news

political_organizational.context: Political party references, especially Madhesh-centric politics
political_organizational.description: Political party primarily representing Madheshi interests

political_organizational.english: South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC)
political_organizational.description: Borrowed acronym from English SAARC; Nepali expansion is the full translated name
Nepal's election authority; frequently referenced during election periods
Nepal's central bank; commonly abbreviated in financial reporting
Common abbreviation for US Dollar in Nepali financial contexts

measurement_unit.context: Distance measurement in news, transportation, geography
measurement_unit.description: Most common distance abbreviation in Nepali text

measurement_unit.context: Weight measurement in commerce, agriculture, daily life
measurement_unit.description: Standard weight abbreviation; colloquially often just किलो

measurement_unit.context: Small distance measurement in health, construction
Precision measurement in technical and medical contexts
Liquid measurement in medicine, cooking, packaging
measurement_unit.description: Common volume abbreviation especially in pharmaceutical and food contexts

measurement_unit.context: Liquid volume measurement for fuel, water, beverages
Small weight measurement in cooking, medicine

measurement_unit.description: Very small weight abbreviation; common on medicine packaging

measurement_unit.context: Volume of construction materials, water supply capacity
measurement_unit.description: Cubic volume abbreviation used in engineering and infrastructure

measurement_unit.context: Area measurement in real estate and construction

measurement_unit.description: Large area abbreviation used in geographic descriptions
Metric area unit used in government and agricultural contexts

measurement_unit.context: Speed measurement in traffic, weather, sports

title_honorific.description: Used before names of medical doctors and academic doctorate holders

title_honorific.context: Academic titles in university and research contexts

title_honorific.description: Combined title for professors who also hold a doctorate; common in Nepali academia

title_honorific.context: Formal address for men in official documents and speech
title_honorific.description: Standard male honorific; also used as a general respect marker
Standard married female honorific; typically written in full but sometimes abbreviated in lists

title_honorific.context: Formal address for women regardless of marital status
title_honorific.description: Gender-neutral female honorific; increasingly common in modern official contexts

title_honorific.context: Addressing ministers, judges, and high-ranking officials
title_honorific.description: Honorific prefix for dignitaries; very common in parliamentary and judicial contexts
Abbreviation for Prime Minister; frequently used in headlines
Title used before names of licensed engineers in Nepal

title_honorific.context: Professional rank prefix, e.g., वरि. अधिवक्ता (Senior Advocate)
title_honorific.description: Seniority prefix used with professional titles

geographic_administrative.description: Former local government body at the district level; replaced by new federal structure but still referenced in older documents
Former smallest administrative unit; now replaced by गाउँपालिका but abbreviation still seen in many documents and land records
Municipal government body; common in addresses and local governance reporting

geographic_administrative.context: Major urban centers like Kathmandu, Pokhara, Lalitpur
geographic_administrative.description: Metropolitan-level municipality; Nepal has several mahanagarpalika

geographic_administrative.context: Large urban centers below metropolitan status
Rural local government under new federal structure
geographic_administrative.description: Current rural local government unit replacing the old VDC system
Provincial administrative unit; Nepal has seven provinces
District administrative unit; Nepal has 77 districts
Ward number within a municipality or rural municipality; the smallest administrative unit
Specific abbreviation for the Kathmandu Metropolitan City government

media_common.context: Time references in schedules, news, daily communication
media_common.description: Afternoon/evening time marker; Nepali equivalent of PM

media_common.context: Time references in schedules, news, daily communication
media_common.description: Morning time marker; Nepali equivalent of AM

media_common.context: Date references in all Nepali official documents and daily use
media_common.description: Nepal's official calendar system; approximately 56.7 years ahead of the Gregorian calendar

media_common.context: International date references and academic contexts
media_common.description: Gregorian calendar reference; used alongside वि.सं. in some contexts

media_common.context: Newar community cultural and calendar references
media_common.description: Traditional Newar calendar used by the Newar community; recognized as national calendar alongside वि.सं.
Page number abbreviation used in citations and references
Reporter credit abbreviation commonly seen in newspaper bylines

media_common.english: Rashtriya Samachar Samiti (RSS) / National News Agency
media_common.description: Nepal's national news agency; commonly credited as source in media
Common news segment abbreviation in broadcast media
